headline: Payoneer to be acquired by Nuvei in $2.75B all-cash deal
summary: Nuvei has agreed to acquire Nasdaq-listed Payoneer Global (NASDAQ:PAYO) in an all-cash deal valuing the cross-border payments company at approximately $2.75 billion, sending Payoneer shares up 4.1%. Under the terms of the agreement, Nuvei will pay $7.40 per share for all outstanding common...

headline: 2 Value Stocks to Target This Week and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: The low valuation multiples for value stocks provide a margin of safety that growth stocks rarely offer. However, the challenge lies in determining whether these cheap assets are genuinely undervalued or simply on sale due to their potentially deteriorating business models.

headline: Canada's Nuvei to buy Payoneer for $2.75 billion in cross-border payments push
summary: Nuvei will buy cross-border payments firm Payoneer for about $2.75 billion in cash, the companies said on Monday, as ‌the Canadian fintech aims to expand globally.  Nuvei will buy all ‌shares of Payoneer for $7.40 apiece, a premium of about 44% to their last close ​on June 8.  Payoneer has a market capitalization of about $2.26 billion, according to data compiled by LSEG.

headline: eBay Inc. (EBAY) Shows Why Trust Tools and Live Selling Still Matter for Marketplace Growth
summary: eBay Inc. (NASDAQ:EBAY) is one of the best e-commerce stocks to buy as global sales hit records. The company remains one of the world’s largest online marketplaces, but its recent moves show it is trying to make core categories more trusted, easier to shop, and more interactive.
